name: Directus With Postgresql
tagline: Directus wraps databases with a dynamic API, and provides an intuitive app for managing its content.
description:
Directus wraps databases with a dynamic API, and provides an intuitive app for managing its content.

Docs: https://directus.io?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  directus:
    image: directus/directus:11
    volumes:
      - directus-uploads:/directus/uploads
      - directus-extensions:/directus/extensions
      - directus-templates:/directus/templates
    environment:
      - KEY=OTJmNThjYzZmM2JmZGRhNWJkODcyYjkw
      - SECRET=OTc4MzU4NWRhMTU4YjdiM2M5NDU4YzA5
      - ADMIN_EMAIL=${ADMIN_EMAIL:-admin@example.com}
      - ADMIN_PASSWORD=a0e598a953f643db7268c9a110859278
      - DB_CLIENT=postgres
      - DB_HOST=postgresql
      - DB_PORT=5432
      - DB_DATABASE=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-directus}
      - DB_USER=u732cdeaf69
      - DB_PASSWORD=c7ef176daf33b9989ee849f9869446ac
      - REDIS_HOST=redis
      - REDIS_PORT=6379
      - WEBSOCKETS_ENABLED=true
      - CORS_ENABLED=${CORS_ENABLED:-true}
      - CORS_ORIGIN=${CORS_ORIGIN}
      - CORS_METHODS=${CORS_METHODS:-GET,POST,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS}
      - CORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS=${CORS_ALLOWED_HEADERS:-Content-Type,Authorization}
      - CORS_CREDENTIALS=${CORS_CREDENTIALS:-true}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://127.0.0.1:8055/admin/login
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42022:8055
  postgresql:
    image: postgis/postgis:16-3.4-alpine
    platform: linux/amd64
    volumes:
      - directus-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u732cdeaf69
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=c7ef176daf33b9989ee849f9869446ac
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-directus}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liva070d6da} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-directus_with_postgresql}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - directus-redis-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - ping
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  directus-uploads: null
  directus-extensions: null
  directus-templates: null
  directus-postgresql-data: null
  directus-redis-data: null
